expectations.text: The skill recognises this as a single-feature scope and recommends /write-spec instead of /prd
expectations.evidence: Without the skill, Claude wrote a full feature spec ('Feature Spec: Dark Mode Toggle') with no mention of scope discrimination, no recommendation to use a different tool. It simply completed the request as a spec.

expectations.text: If a PRD is produced anyway, it should explicitly note that a feature spec would be more appropriate for this scope
expectations.evidence: A feature spec was produced directly. No note about scope appropriateness. No mention of /write-spec or /prd distinction.
